_comment: Species: Undying Ancient Body (道古不灭体) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Undying Ancient Body

canonical.appearance: Ancient undying body 6 m, body radiates ancient+undying power, skin is ancient-clan bronze
canonical.size: 6 m manifestation, 5000 jin; true form spans ancient-realms
canonical.behavior: Undying-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing ancient+undying essence
canonical.diet: ancient essence, undying herbs, ancient qi
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained undying ancient body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.bloodline: Ancient+Undying lineage; ancient clan + undying bloodline
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: undying_ancient_body_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
